noticia.titulo: New Books Video: Releases of the Week! April 7, 2026
noticia.texto_resumido: The wait is finally over today, April 8, 2026, as we pull back the curtain on the most thrilling weekly arrivals in the Science Fiction, Fantasy, Horror, and Young Adult fields! We've curated a list of the most anticipated titles hitting the scene this week and we're very excited to share them with you, so get ready to add a few new books to your TBR pile!
